Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emperor's armor]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor's white armor provides protective Intent that defends essence.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Emperor's armor is worn by Calder for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Emperor's armor is imbued with complex Intent and possesses protective powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — A mannequin in the costume gallery wears a full set of the Emperor's white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor's armor has an Intent to protect and preserve life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Steward had the Emperor's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor's armor is keeping Calder alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor's armor kept Petal alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder wore the Emperor's white armor ashore.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor's armor was not meant for swimming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Calder is wearing the Emperor’s armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor’s armor is a priceless treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor's armor protects against Elderspawn bites.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor’s armor crashes down to the deck plate by plate.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The armor Calder was wearing turned out to be fake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Calder Marten wore the Emperor’s armor from the neck down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Champions stripped Calder's body of the Emperor's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten wears the Emperor’s armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac burns plates of the Emperor's armor off Calder.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
